Runed Sea Shell [Enduring Breath]  
 


EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
This item can be used in tradeskills.
Effect: Enduring Breath (Any Slot, Casting Time: 6.0) as Level 12
WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Runed Sea Shell [Enduring Breath]

EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
This item can be used in tradeskills.
Effect: Enduring Breath (Any Slot, Casting Time: 6.0) as Level 12
WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Water Breathing Sea Shell
Item Type:Potion
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 7 sp 5 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-07 11:34:37
Page Updated:Wed Jan 26th, 2011

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 2,271pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 48
[Drops | Quests | Recipes | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Siren's Grotto
NPC Name
a neriad maiden
a neriad mistress
a siren beguiler
a siren enchantress
a siren enticer
a siren myrmidon
a siren seductress
a siren templar

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Thurgadin
Quest Name
Coldain Shawl #7: Runed Coldain Prayer Shawl
Used in 2 recipes.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Siren's Grotto

I am looking to buy 1 or 2 of these for my shawl quest. I don't have the means at the moment to go and take it from the sirens in Siren's Grotto.

Please contact me in-game on Maelin Starpyre.
▲ Page top
They do drop !
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2004 at 8:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251115666
View User Forum
36 posts
I was killing SG with a group 5 last night. The group members were between 55 and 61.
An Enchanter and high MR is a must. In about 2 hours of killing we left with 4 Runed Shells (Breath) and 4 Runed Shells (Cloud). So they are not too rare.

# Oct 13 2003 at 1:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783340189
10 posts
They are not No Drop, or LORE. Bought one today for 499pp in bazar on EMarr. There were at least 20 of them for sale at the time ranging from 499-1500pp. Succeeded on the first combine and was trivial to me with a skill of 144.

# May 05 2004 at 11:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783699588
10 posts
I suggest that when you hunt for siren hairs you keep a sharp eye out for one of these to drop, i got one since i have an eb item i quickly destroyed this shell (not knowing what it was used for). So i went the the baz to find them selling for 2.5k each on vazaelle server. Watch for one if your baz prices are high like vaz server.
▲ Page top
Enduring Breath - Sea Shell
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2003 at 10:11 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253769762
56 posts
Fought for days CS, getting the Siren Hair,and after
4 attempts got the 6th Shawl. Never seen anything
with Enduring Breath in CS, except the Runed Sea Shell Necklace - 5 charges. Bought a Runed Sea Shell
- 1 Charge Endurinf Breath. Would not combine in the
Mortar Pedstal -with Sm Vel Brick. After much
reding and comparing the jpg's .. realized I had the
Sea Shell with the: "Cloud" Effect .. not the one needed. Am now hunting SG for the Sea Shell with
"Effect . Enduring Breath" Thanks to all that posted
the correct info, so I can now look for the right
Sea Shell

▲ Page top
TOUGH!!
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2003 at 5:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966275115
16 posts
OK guys.. since they changed the Sirens in SG to make them harder... they are indeed.

I used to solo them and could handle 3 at a time. (65 mage btw).

I just went there today with a 65 chanter and they are much harder. Adds galore also. I wasn't able to find a real safe place and such either. My point is. You will need about 4 level 65's on the average to camp the Sirens in SG now. GL to all.
▲ Page top
Info
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2003 at 7:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758320218
8 posts
Alright folks, here it is. This drops in Sirens Grotto ONLY. The one with (cloud) is much more common. In CS a runed seashell necklace drops, looks just like the runed sea shell, but is a neck item with 5 charges of EB. (and NO even if you expend 4 of the charges, it will NOT combine for the shawl 7 quest.) On a sidenote, the trivial for the pottery combines ( with this item) is 162. Confirmed myself. Sells for approx 500 to 600PP on TP server. hope this helps ) If you go hunting for em, have 1.5 to 2 groups go in the 60+ to 55 range. Keep magic resist up at all times, oh and don't drown as the whole zone is underwater ;)
▲ Page top
Runed Sea Shell
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2003 at 2:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256431956
5 posts
I personally think it is unfair to have 2 items with the same name in game. It causes confusion, if you ask me. I understand that there are 2 different effects, but that is beside the point. I was honestly hoping it was a bug of some sort, but after reading here, I guess it isn't :(
▲ Page top
Where are the Sirens?
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2003 at 3:49 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592792172826
View User Forum
Scholar
29 posts
Strange as it may seem, I could not find anyone who had actually gone hunting for the Runed Seashell with 1 charge of Enduring Breath. And yes they definately drop in SG, and in all the hunting we did in CS for the 6th shawl...we did not find any there. Anyone I had talked to had either bought theirs or been given it from a friend.

So the question became, where are the sirens that drop the seashells? In the orginal map posted at EqAtlas, it was a map from Quester of Norrath and was missing the eastern half of the zone. If you now go to EqAtals, the maps have been updated (by Draelon Stormsong) and if you choose the level 1 map, at location neg550, neg 250 you will find a white area, which happens to be a castle. That is where the sirens are. It is their castle/fortress in fact.

We took 2 groups (lvl 55 avg.) there and held the castle area for over 3 hours and collected 11 Runed Seashells. 6 of them had the 1 charge of cloud for the 9th coldain ring quest and 5 of them had the single charge of EB, for the 7th Coldain Prayer Shawl.

In my reading I had seen references to a well (loc pos75, neg50), but have not been down it yet so I have no idea how many spawn there.

The siren seductresses, here in SG, are slightly tougher than the ones in CS, as these ones also cast Gravity Flux... we popped to the ceiling a few times...lol.

Safe Hunting!

Thoraz - 54th Paladin of Vazaelle

Edited, Wed Apr 16 16:12:31 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Where are the Sirens?
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2004 at 3:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257902098
16 posts
Ive tried to find this spot 3 times, and have died 3 times trying to find it. As a lvl 65 Druid, invis drops when the seahorses hit you, the mobbed by fish, and IF you get out of the water, you are visables and get mobbed by the other ugly things in zone. I soloed my tooth from WW side, but am unable to find this "castle" of sirens.. Any help?
▲ Page top
Not in CS
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2003 at 5:23 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593362081897
View User Forum
65 posts
The one that drops in Cobalt Scar is 3 charges of EB and is not the 1 charge one that is used in 7th shawl (oh how I wish it was). Hope that clears it up.
▲ Page top
Runed Sea Shell
QuoteReply
# May 07 2002 at 1:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757264680
View User Forum
12 posts
I can definetly confirm that I looted one of these in Colbalt Scar from one of the 3 Sirens at the cave entrance to SG. Approx date was april 5th, 2002. Unfortunately, I must have destroyed it due to lack of room before I knew its worth. (Sigh) thought I was done with being charmed every single fight.

Asheram
Ranger of Tunare
Povar
▲ Page top
2 types
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 1:19 PM Rating: Good
ParadiseLost
Scholar
151 posts
There are 2 types of this that drop. Runed sea shell (EB) which has 1 charge of Enduring breath and is used in the 7th shawl quest. Runed sea shell (cloud) is for the 9th ring quest. The way to identify them is by there effect EB has Effect: Enduring Breath, Cloud has Effect: Cloud.

I honestly haven't fought alot of sirens in the grotto and so far the only one to drop the EB was the named Mistress Latazyra. I did get the Cloud the other night off a Siren Seductress.
▲ Page top
Runed Sea Shell
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2001 at 11:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361106273
5 posts
You are right, these drop in Siren's Grotto and not in Cobalt Scar. Similar to the runed sea shell (cloud) which is used in the Ninth Coldain Ring Quest, these drop off the Siren's in the Grotto. Also you need to head to the Grotto anyway to pick up the swordfish tooth (no drop). Let me know if you ever want to organize a trip Bythton or need help with the sirens.

Quaras Shadowscythe
52 Druid--Bristlebane

# May 11 2002 at 5:00 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591774534502
14 posts
I have hunted the sirens in CS several times for the 6th coldain shawl (took 4 attempts and 2 attempts for a guildmate). They drop a runed necklace with 5 charges of enduring breath, not the shell with 1 charge. The graphic is the same but the items are not.
